scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 100 Trying [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq:[$InvCSeq] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> MyHeader: [$InvVia] Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 481 CallLeg/Transaction doesnt exist [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 CANCEL Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> MyHeader: [$InvVia] Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 180 Ringing [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq:[$InvCSeq] Supported: 100rel, timer Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000

SIP/2.0 200 OK Via:[$InvVia] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq:[$InvCSeq] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Av-Global-Session-ID: 00fe2c47-42d9-4801-9379-5b83ad7d0000 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000

BYE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] From: [last_To:] To: [last_From:] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 813324 BYE Contact: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port] Content-Length: 0
SIP/2.0 100 Trying Via:[$ReInv_Via] From:[$ReInvFrom] To:[$ReInvTo] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq:[$ReInvCSeq] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 481 Call/Transaction Does Not Exist Via:[$ReInv_Via] From:[$ReInvFrom] To:[$ReInvTo] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq:[$ReInvCSeq] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: 0
